targets.query:
from(bucket: "bandwidth")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bandwidth_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "bandwidth")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bandwidth_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bytes_per_sec")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "bandwidth")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bandwidth_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
